common.clipboardUnavailable: Clipboard is not available in this browser.

app.pageTitle: TenRusl Tutorial Linux — Structured Linux Tutorial Portal
app.brandTagline: Structured Linux tutorials for server, virtualization, security, backup, and workstation
app.tocEmpty: No headings were found in this document.
app.loadedSuccess: Successfully loaded {path}. Documentation rendered with breadcrumb, navigation tree, TOC, syntax highlighting, and Mermaid.
app.errorCauseFileProtocol: The HTML file is opened via file:// instead of an HTTP server.
app.errorCauseWrongName: The Markdown path still points to an old file or the requested file does not exist.
app.errorCauseWrongFolder: The content structure or manifest paths do not match the expected locations.
app.errorCauseSavedState: The browser is still using an older source from localStorage or a previous cache.
app.fixStep1: Point the root app to assets/content/index.md or another valid content entry page.
app.fixStep2: Make sure Markdown files, index pages, and manifests are stored in the correct folders.
app.fixStep3: Clear stale cache and reload the project through a local HTTP server.
app.offlineBody: Some resources may be unavailable until the connection returns.
